summary: Iteration 19 Testing Complete - Global Fact Authority Bypass Violation Fixes VERIFIED. All 18 tests passed. Code review confirms all bypass violations from the audit have been fixed.
critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED V1: format_advisor_brain_prompt does NOT contain 'ASK THEM' or 'NOT SPECIFIED - You MUST ask'
VERIFIED V1: format_advisor_brain_prompt reads known_facts_prompt from context.get('known_facts_prompt')
VERIFIED V1: format_advisor_brain_prompt uses 'Not yet known' as fallback instead of 'ASK THEM'
VERIFIED V4: soundboard_chat imports resolve_facts and build_known_facts_prompt from fact_resolution
VERIFIED V4: soundboard_chat injects facts_prompt into system_message via fact_block
VERIFIED V7: generate_checklist uses build_advisor_context + format_advisor_brain_prompt
VERIFIED V7: generate_action_plan uses build_advisor_context + format_advisor_brain_prompt
VERIFIED V6: boardroom_respond imports resolve_facts and build_known_facts_prompt from fact_resolution
VERIFIED V6: boardroom_respond injects facts_prompt into system_prompt as 'RESOLVED BUSINESS FACTS'
VERIFIED: All tested endpoints return 401/403 for unauthenticated requests
VERIFIED: Backend health check returns healthy
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 19 verified all Global Fact Authority bypass violation fixes. Key fixes verified: (1) format_advisor_brain_prompt no longer contains 'ASK THEM' and uses 'Not yet known' fallback, (2) format_advisor_brain_prompt injects known_facts_prompt from context, (3) BusinessProfile.js and Settings.js both use /api/business-profile/context endpoint, (4) soundboard_chat imports from fact_resolution and injects facts_prompt into system_message, (5) generate_checklist and generate_action_plan both use build_advisor_context + format_advisor_brain_prompt, (6) boardroom_respond imports from fact_resolution and injects resolved facts into system_prompt.

features_verified.format_advisor_brain_prompt_not_yet_know: COMPLETE - 'Not yet known' used as fallback
